label: ⚙️ Customize
expected_behavior: Calls NBDWidgets.openPicker() which appends the Widget Library modal overlay (#wPickerContainer) listing all 30 widgets grouped by category with active ones checked.
notes: Header control of the HOME view. data-target module-method dispatch resolves window.NBDWidgets.openPicker.

label: ＋ New Estimate
expected_behavior: goTo('est') then startNewEstimate() — navigates to the Estimates view and opens a fresh estimate.
notes: Header CTA. Same button label also appears in view-dash (line 7789) — this row is the view-home instance.

label: Pipeline Value (widget card)
expected_behavior: Clicking the card (outside the ✕) navigates via goTo('crm'). Card body shows total pipeline $ big-number, a colored stage bar, and lead/won counts computed from window._leads.
notes: Default-active widget (DEFAULT_WIDGETS widgets.js:606). Whole card is clickable → goTo('crm').

label: ✕ (remove widget — representative of every widget card)
expected_behavior: data-w-action='removeWidget' data-w-id='pipeline-value' → NBDWidgets.removeWidget(id): drops id from active list, persists to localStorage 'nbd_home_widgets', re-renders grid, toasts 'Widget removed'. data-w-stop='1' stops the card-click navigation.
notes: REPEATS once per widget card — every active widget gets its own ✕. Representative row; removal is non-destructive (just hides; re-addable via picker) but flagged delete per rubric (removes a UI element).

label: Hot Leads (widget card)
expected_behavior: Card click → goTo('crm'). Body lists up to 5 non-terminal hot leads (contacted/est-sent/callback-due) as rows from window._leads.
notes: Default-active. Inner lead rows carry data-w-goto='crm' (line 102) so each row also navigates to CRM.

label: Hot lead row (navigate)
expected_behavior: data-w-goto='crm' → goTo('crm') via the widgets delegate.
notes: REPEATS per hot-lead row (up to 5). Representative row.

label: Win Rate (widget card)
expected_behavior: Card click → goTo('crm'). Body renders an SVG donut gauge of won/closed percentage from window._leads.
notes: Default-active. No internal controls (pure SVG display).

label: Revenue This Month (widget card)
expected_behavior: Card click → goTo('crm'). Body shows month revenue big-number, progress bar vs monthly goal, and a clickable goal-edit footer.
notes: Default-active. The 'Revenue' widget named in the surface brief. Contains the goal ✎ edit (next row).

label: X% of $Yk goal ✎ (edit monthly goal)
expected_behavior: Click → window.prompt('Set your monthly revenue goal (USD)', currentGoal); parses positive number, writes localStorage 'nbd_monthly_goal', toasts confirmation, and re-renders the revenue widget in place. Rejects non-positive with a warning toast.
notes: The Revenue goal ✎ edit called out in the brief. Uses native prompt(); click is bound per-render via addEventListener (not the data-w delegate).

label: Task Checklist (widget card)
expected_behavior: Card click → goTo('crm'). Body renders the task list from localStorage 'nbd_home_tasks' (seeded with 4 defaults if empty) plus an add-task input + button.
notes: Default-active. Contains the per-task checkboxes, add-task input, and + button (next rows).

label: Task checkbox (per task)
expected_behavior: onchange → window._wToggleTask(idx, checked): sets tasks[idx].d, persists to localStorage 'nbd_home_tasks', re-renders grid (checked items get strikethrough/dimmed).
notes: REPEATS once per task (4 defaults). Representative row. Inline onchange — note this is an inline handler attribute; verify it fires under CSP (widgets render via innerHTML).

label: Add task… (text input)
expected_behavior: Free-text field; its value is read by _wAddTask when the + button is pressed to append a new {t,d:false} task.
notes: No Enter-key handler on this input — must press the + button. Empty/whitespace value is ignored.

label: + (add task)
expected_behavior: data-w-action='addTask' → _wActions.addTask → window._wAddTask(): reads #w-task-input, pushes trimmed value as a new task to localStorage 'nbd_home_tasks', re-renders grid. No-op if input empty.
notes: Clicking re-renders the whole grid; note the click also bubbles to the card-click nav unless suppressed — verify it doesn't navigate to CRM after adding (no data-w-stop on this +).

label: Daily Floors (widget card)
expected_behavior: Card click → goTo('crm') (daily-floors not in NAV_MAP, defaults to crm). Body renders each floor (Doors Knocked/Contacts/Appts by default, or cfg.floors) with progress bar from localStorage nbd_floor_progress_<date>.
notes: Default-active. Contains the 'Open Daily Tracker →' button (next row).

label: Open Daily Tracker →
expected_behavior: data-w-action='openDailyTracker' → window.open('/pro/daily-success/', '_self') — navigates the same tab to the Daily Success tracker page.
notes: Full-page navigation away from the SPA to /pro/daily-success/. Click also bubbles to card nav (no data-w-stop) but the _self navigation wins.

label: Quick Add Lead (widget card)
expected_behavior: Card click → goTo('crm'). Body renders name input, address input, damage-type select, and Add → button.
notes: Default-active. Contains the name/address inputs, type select, and ADD button (next rows).

label: Homeowner name (text input)
expected_behavior: Free-text; value read by _wQuickAddLead and pre-filled into the lead modal's #leadName field on Add.
notes: Optional field — only address is required by _wQuickAddLead.

label: Property address (text input)
expected_behavior: Free-text; value read by _wQuickAddLead and pre-filled into the lead modal's #leadAddr on Add. REQUIRED — empty value triggers 'Enter an address' error toast and aborts.
notes: Required gate for the Add button.

label: Damage type (select)
expected_behavior: Options: Roof - Hail / Roof - Wind / Siding / Full Exterior. Selected value read by _wQuickAddLead and pre-filled into lead modal #leadDamage on Add.
notes: The 'type <select>' from the brief. 4 static options.

label: Add →
expected_behavior: data-w-action='quickAddLead' → _wQuickAddLead(): requires address (else error toast); calls window.openLeadModal() and after 100ms prefills #leadName/#leadAddr/#leadDamage; toasts 'Opening lead form...'.
notes: The ADD button from the brief. Does NOT directly save a lead — it opens the full lead modal pre-populated. Click also bubbles to card nav (no data-w-stop).

label: Recent Activity (widget card)
expected_behavior: Card click → goTo('crm'). Body lists the 5 most recently updated/created leads with a stage dot and relative timestamp from window._leads.
notes: Default-active. Activity rows are display-only (no per-row data-w-goto in this widget).

label: Weather Radar (widget card)
expected_behavior: Card click → goTo('d2d') (NAV_MAP maps weather-radar to d2d). Body mounts a Leaflet map (#w-radar-map) with OSM base + Iowa State NEXRAD radar overlay, centered ~[39.07,-84.17].
notes: Default-active. Map is display-only; clicking the card navigates to d2d. Requires window.L (Leaflet) loaded.

label: North Star Goal (widget card)
expected_behavior: Card click → goTo('crm') (north-star not in NAV_MAP, default crm). Body shows cfg.northStar from localStorage nbd_ds_config, or the placeholder 'Set your North Star in Settings → Daily OS'.
notes: Default-active. The 'settings link' in the brief is just placeholder text — there is NO clickable link element here; the whole card navigates to crm, not to Settings. Display-only.

label: Daily Quote (widget card)
expected_behavior: Card click → goTo('crm') (default). Body shows a deterministic daily motivational quote (indexed by date-of-month) with attribution.
notes: Default-active. Display-only.

label: Streak Counter (widget card)
expected_behavior: Card click → goTo('crm') (default). Body shows the streak number from localStorage nbd_streak with a flame/snowflake icon and encouragement text.
notes: Default-active (the 'Streak' from the brief). Display-only.

label: ＋ Add Widget
expected_behavior: onclick → window.NBDWidgets.openPicker() — opens the Widget Library picker modal (same as the header Customize button).
notes: Always rendered as the last card in the grid (appended after active widgets).

label: Picker overlay backdrop
expected_behavior: data-w-action='closePickerIfSelf' → closes the picker only if the click target IS the overlay itself (backdrop click-to-dismiss).
notes: Revealed only after Customize / Add Widget opens the picker. Clicking inside the panel does not close it.

label: ✕ (close picker)
expected_behavior: data-w-action='closePicker' → NBDWidgets.closePicker() removes #wPickerContainer from the DOM.
notes: Header close X of the picker modal.

label: Widget toggle (per widget, in picker)
expected_behavior: onchange → NBDWidgets.toggleWidget(widgetId, checked): adds/removes the id from active list, persists to localStorage 'nbd_home_widgets', and re-renders the home grid live.
notes: REPEATS once per widget in the registry (30 widgets across 5 categories: Pipeline & Sales, Operations, Tools & Quick Actions, Motivation & Tracking, Data & Analytics). Representative row. Inline onchange attribute.

label: Reset to Defaults
expected_behavior: data-w-action='resetDefaults' → NBDWidgets.resetDefaults(): writes the 12 DEFAULT_WIDGETS to localStorage, closes the picker, re-renders the grid, toasts 'Widgets reset to defaults'.
notes: Destructive to the user's custom layout (resets to defaults) but treated as none per rubric (no data/send/charge).

label: Done
expected_behavior: data-w-action='closePicker' → NBDWidgets.closePicker() removes the picker modal from the DOM (changes already persisted live on each toggle).
notes: Footer primary action; identical handler to the header ✕.

label: Quick Estimate (widget card — conditional)
expected_behavior: Card click → goTo('est'). Body has Sq Ft + $/sq number inputs that live-compute a total via _wQuickEst on input.
notes: NOT default-active — only present after the user adds it via the picker. reveal_state used as proxy for 'opt-in widget' (no plan/role gate exists; it is user-enabled). Inputs #w-qe-sqft / #w-qe-rate fire oninput=_wQuickEst, result in #w-qe-result.

label: Quick Estimate Sq Ft / $-per-sq inputs
expected_behavior: type=number; oninput → window._wQuickEst() computes (sqft/100)*rate and writes formatted $ to #w-qe-result. Rate defaults to 350.
reveal_state: after:add Quick Estimate widget via picker
notes: Two number inputs in the opt-in Quick Estimate widget; representative row covers both.

label: Quick Draw — address input + 📏 Open Drawing Tool (conditional)
expected_behavior: Button data-w-action='quickDraw' → _wQuickDraw(): goTo('draw') and, if #w-qd-addr has a value, prefills #drawSearch and runs searchDraw() after 200ms.
reveal_state: after:add Quick Draw widget via picker
notes: Opt-in widget (not default). Bundles the address input #w-qd-addr (text) and its action button.

label: Ask Joe — input + Ask button (conditional)
expected_behavior: Button data-w-action='askJoe' (and input onkeydown Enter) → _wAskJoe(): if window.sendJoeMessage exists, goTo('joe') and forwards the question to the full Joe chat; else shows fallback prompt. Clears input.
reveal_state: after:add Ask Joe widget via picker
notes: Opt-in widget. Input #w-joe-input has inline onkeydown Enter → _wAskJoe. Sends an AI request when wired to full Joe.

label: 📋 Copy (booking link — conditional)
expected_behavior: data-w-action='copyToClipboard' data-w-id=<cal url> → navigator.clipboard.writeText(url) + toast 'Copied!'.
reveal_state: after:add Booking Link widget via picker (requires nbd_cal_settings.username)
notes: Opt-in widget AND only renders buttons when Cal.com username is set in localStorage (else shows 'Set up Cal.com first'). Double-gated.

label: 💬 SMS (booking link — conditional)
expected_behavior: data-w-action='smsBookLink' data-w-id=<cal url> → window.open('sms:?body=Book here: <url>') — opens the device SMS composer prefilled.
reveal_state: after:add Booking Link widget via picker (requires nbd_cal_settings.username)
notes: Opens an SMS draft (no auto-send — user must hit send in their SMS app). Flagged send to stay behind the confirm boundary during testing.

label: Open Calendar → (Today's Schedule — conditional)
expected_behavior: data-w-goto='schedule' → goTo('schedule'). Only rendered when nbd_cal_settings.username is set; otherwise the widget shows a 'Connect Cal.com in Settings' empty state with no button.
reveal_state: after:add Today's Schedule widget via picker (requires nbd_cal_settings.username)
notes: Opt-in + Cal.com-gated widget.

label: Recent estimate row → Estimates (conditional)
expected_behavior: data-w-goto='est' → goTo('est'). Each row shows an estimate address + total from window._estimates.
reveal_state: after:add Recent Estimates widget via picker
notes: Opt-in widget; rows REPEAT (up to 3). Representative row.

label: Open Template Library → (Recent Documents — conditional)
expected_behavior: data-w-goto='docs' → goTo('docs'). Card also has a 'Template Library' row with the same data-w-goto.
reveal_state: after:add Recent Documents widget via picker
notes: Opt-in widget. Two elements (row + button) both data-w-goto='docs'.

label: Open Full Map → (Territory Heat Map — conditional)
expected_behavior: data-w-goto='map' → goTo('map'). Card body mounts a Leaflet heat-map of geocoded leads (#w-mini-heat).
reveal_state: after:add Territory Heat Map widget via picker
notes: Opt-in widget. Map is display-only; the button navigates to the full map.

label: Other opt-in widget cards (display-only, card-click nav)
expected_behavior: Each card click → goTo per NAV_MAP (close-board→closeboard, stage-funnel/source-breakdown/damage-type-chart/monthly-trend/stale-leads→crm, storm-alerts→storm, material-watch→products, team-leaderboard→board) or default crm. Bodies are pure data displays with no internal controls.
notes: Consolidated row for the 10 remaining registry widgets that are opt-in and have NO interactive sub-controls (only the whole-card navigation + their ✕ remove, covered generically by d2-home-004). Listed so the denominator accounts for every registry widget. storm-alerts hits NWS API on render.
